name: Nori Writing Desk
subtitle: Solid Oak & Steel
description: The Nori desk is designed around the ritual of writing. A subtly raised rear shelf organises objects without cluttering the main work surface. The solid oak top is jointed from book-matched planks; the powder-coated steel frame is welded and ground by hand in our Lisbon atelier. A desk for those who understand that the objects around you shape the quality of your thinking.
care: Clean with a dry cloth. Apply furniture oil annually. Avoid placing hot items or liquids directly on the surface.
shipping: Flat-pack delivery with illustrated assembly guide and all hardware included. Assembly time approximately 45 minutes.
metaDescription: Nori Writing Desk — solid oak and powder-coated steel. Book-matched top, raised rear shelf. Crafted in Portugal. From $1,240 — BeautyHome.
altText: Nori writing desk with book-matched solid oak top on blackened steel frame, minimal workspace styling
